completion: NovaBrew is a smart coffee machine that connects to your phone via the NovaBrew app, allowing you to brew coffee remotely, schedule brews, and customize drink strength.

prompt: How do I connect NovaBrew to WiFi?
completion: To connect NovaBrew to WiFi: 1) Open the NovaBrew app, 2) Tap 'Add Device', 3) Hold the sync button on your NovaBrew for 3 seconds until the light flashes blue, 4) Follow the in-app instructions to complete setup.

If your NovaBrew won't turn on, please try these steps: 1) Check the power cable is firmly connected, 2) Try a different power outlet, 3) Hold the power button for 5 seconds. If the issue persists, contact NovaBrew support at support@novabrew.com.

prompt: How do I reset NovaBrew to factory settings?
completion: To factory reset your NovaBrew: Hold the power button and the brew button simultaneously for 10 seconds until the LED flashes red three times. Note: this will erase all your saved preferences and WiFi settings.

prompt: Can I schedule a brew in advance?
completion: Yes! Open the NovaBrew app, tap 'Schedule', choose your brew time, strength, and cup size, then tap 'Confirm'. Your NovaBrew will automatically start brewing at the scheduled time.

prompt: What coffee pods are compatible with NovaBrew?
completion: NovaBrew is compatible with all standard Nespresso-style pods as well as NovaBrew branded pods available on our website. We recommend NovaBrew pods for the best flavor experience.

To clean NovaBrew: 1) Empty and rinse the water tank daily, 2) Run a cleaning cycle weekly by pressing the clean button for 3 seconds, 3) Descale monthly using NovaBrew descaling solution available on our website.

prompt: My NovaBrew app won't connect to the machine.
completion: If the app won't connect: 1) Ensure Bluetooth and WiFi are enabled on your phone, 2) Make sure NovaBrew is powered on, 3) Force close and reopen the app, 4) Try forgetting the device in the app and re-pairing. Still stuck? Email support@novabrew.com.

prompt: What is the warranty on NovaBrew?
completion: NovaBrew comes with a 2-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects. The warranty does not cover damage from misuse or unauthorized modifications. Register your device at novabrew.com/warranty within 30 days of purchase to activate your warranty.

prompt: How do I adjust brew strength on NovaBrew?
completion: To adjust brew strength: Open the NovaBrew app and tap 'Brew Settings'. You can choose from 5 strength levels: Extra Light, Light, Medium, Strong, and Extra Strong. You can also adjust strength directly on the machine by pressing the strength button before brewing.
